macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Bitcoin and Ether Surge on U.S.-Iran Ceasefire Announcement
items.summary: Bitcoin rose roughly 4% and Ether 6% in the strongest single-day move in over a month following President Trump’s U.S.-Iran two-week ceasefire announcement. CryptoQuant reports $2.1B increase in BTC and $2.2B in ETH perpetual futures open interest, driven by new long positions rather than short liquidations.

items.title: Crypto Market Steady Amid Fragile US-Iran Ceasefire
items.summary: Bitcoin up 0.8% to $72,271, Ethereum down 0.1% to $2,213, XRP steady at $1.35, and total market cap at $2.52T as risk appetite returns despite ceasefire uncertainty. Traditional markets also rose, with Nasdaq and Dow gaining 0.73%.

items.title: Crypto Market Cap Drops 1.65% to $2.41T as Bitcoin Struggles at $71K
items.summary: Market cap fell amid Bitcoin's failed breakout above $73K, retreating to $71K; Ethereum down 4% to $2.18K. Underperformers include Algorand (-11.4%), Aptos and Polkadot (-6.1% each); US SEC calls past crypto prosecutions misguided.

items.title: Cryptocurrency Market Sees $232 Million in Liquidations
items.summary: The market experienced $232 million in total liquidations over the past 24 hours, according to CoinAnk data reported by Foresight News.

items.title: Split Capital Hedge Fund Shuts Down Amid Declining Crypto Projects
items.summary: Zahir Abtikar announced closure of Split Capital hedge fund, citing ineffectiveness of the model as high-quality crypto projects decline and many imitate others.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Meta Launches Muse Spark, Its Most Powerful Proprietary AI Model Yet
items.summary: Meta released Muse Spark, the first major product from its new Meta Superintelligence Lab led by Chief AI Officer Alexandr Wang, marking a shift to proprietary models with paid API access planned. The company is ramping up AI investments to $135 billion this year, positioning it as a foundation for 'personal superintelligence.'

items.title: Anthropic Withholds New Claude Mythos Model Over Cybersecurity Risks
items.summary: Anthropic delayed public release of its powerful Claude Mythos AI model due to its ability to identify thousands of software vulnerabilities across major systems, raising 'AI doomsday' concerns about potential misuse on critical infrastructure like grids and hospitals.

items.title: Anthropic's Alarming New AI Too Powerful for Public Release, Experts Warn
items.summary: Anthropic announced its latest model is unreleasable to the public amid fears of its advanced capabilities, while facing U.S. government scrutiny including a court rejection of its bid to halt Pentagon labeling it a supply chain risk.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Big New Nintendo First-Party Game Leaked for Switch 2
items.summary: Rumors of a major Nintendo first-party title leak for Switch 2, alongside delays for 007 First Light on the platform and a potential reveal date for Assassin's Creed Black Flag Remake.

items.title: PSXSplash Tool Enables Unity Development for Real PS1 Hardware
items.summary: New PSXSplash toolkit allows developers to create PS1 games using Unity and compile them for actual PlayStation 1 hardware or MiSTer FPGA, boosting retro game development.

items.title: Extraction Shooter Genre Review: Best of 20 Titles Tested
items.summary: Comprehensive playtest of 20 extraction shooters including Marathon, Arc Raiders, and Tarkov from 2025, identifying top performers worth playing.

items.title: Europa Universalis 5 1.2 Update Promises Major Trade and Economy Fixes
items.summary: Upcoming free 1.2 patch for EU5 introduces significant changes to trade, economy, buildings, and cities, with Fate of the Phoenix DLC arriving soon.

items.title: Nintendo Switch Competitor Showcased with Limited Game Library
items.summary: Review of an obscure Nintendo Switch rival priced at $400, featuring only about 12 games like Space Rocks, with more titles in development.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
